patchNotes:
v1.9.7 — Added 4 PUBLIC ACTIVITIES capability groups (AutoCAD, Revit, 3dsMax, Inventor) with 13 Autodesk-published public activities: AutoCAD.PlotToPDF+prod, AutoCAD.AcSvfPublish+prod, AutoCAD.AcF2dPublish+prod, AutoCAD.AcLMVPublish+prod, Autodesk.Nop+Latest, Revit.RvtIOSketchItActivity2018+prod, Revit.RvtIOSandboxTestActivity2018+prod, 3dsMax.bakeToTexture+Latest, 3dsMax.HelloWorld+Latest, Inventor.ChangeParams+prod, Inventor.iLogic_Volume2020+prod, Inventor.Configuration+Beta, Inventor.BasicPluginTest+prod. All marked callable=true with workItemTemplate. PlotToPDF and Nop args VERIFIED; others marked NEEDS_LIVE_VERIFICATION.
[v2 patch] Removed 11 stale 404 activities (AcSvf,AcF2d,AcLMV,RevitSketchIt,RevitSandboxTest,InventorChangeParams,InventorILogicVolume,InventorConfiguration,InventorBasicPluginTest,3dsMaxBakeToTexture,3dsMaxHelloWorld). Removed empty Revit+Inventor public-activities groups. Fixed PlotToPDF Result verb put→post. Added: AutoCAD.PlotSheetsetToPDF+prod, 3dsMax.UVUnwrapMesh+prod/+latest, 3dsMax.OpenNetworkTests+Latest, Fusion.ScriptJob+Latest, Fusion.ScriptBundleJob+Latest, Autodesk.Long/ReportZip/VarArg* test utilities. All entries verified against live DA API (2026-05-25).

schemaConstraints.riskInheritanceRule: op-level-overrides: Each operation risk field is authoritative. Capability risk equals the maximum risk of its member operations (REVIEW < DESTRUCTIVE < BLOCKED). Agent planners should gate on operation-level risk, not capability-level risk. Note: AUTO is no longer valid at operation level; it is valid only at capability level as a sentinel meaning 'derive from max(op.risk)'.
schemaConstraints.authScopePolicy: REST write/delete operations must carry at least one write-intent scope. Accepted write-intent scopes: data:write, bucket:create, bucket:delete, application:service_account:write, application:service_account:delete, pws:order:write, account:write. Note: account:write covers BIM360 Account Admin and ACC Admin APIs (project/user management); data:write covers OSS/DM file operations — these are distinct scope families. Exceptions (no scope required): OpenID discovery endpoints (get_jwks, get_openid_configuration) and self-scoped token operations (revoke_token, logout_user).

authFlowTypes.(SDK): Browser-side JavaScript SDK method. Auth established at viewer initialisation via Autodesk.Viewing.Initializer(); individual SDK calls do not perform OAuth or HTTP to APS. See tokenSource field on initialize_viewer, load_document, load_document_node.
authFlowTypes.2LO-client-credentials: OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials Grant — application-level access.
authFlowTypes.3LO-auth-code: OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Grant — user-delegated access.
authFlowTypes.3LO-PKCE: OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Grant with PKCE (RFC 7636) — public/SPA/mobile clients; code_challenge replaces client_secret.
authFlowTypes.3LO-refresh: OAuth 2.0 Refresh Token Grant (RFC 6749 §6) — exchanges a refresh_token for a new access_token without re-prompting the user.

rateLimitTierDefinitions.standard: Default APS rate limit: ~7 req/s burst, no documented daily cap. Subject to account-level quotas.

schemaConstraints.callableFieldSemantics: callable=false marks registry entries that are NOT invocable APS API calls: documentation lookups (list_systems, list_events_for_system), consumer-hosted webhook handlers (receive_callback, receive_exchange_callback), and local client-side operations (sign_jwt_assertion). Agent tool generators MUST exclude callable=false entries from generated tool catalogs.

excludedGroups.reason: Reserved for future 3dsmax:animation-and-rigging group (Biped, CAT, Skin modifier). Not catalogued in v1.2.0 — DA workitem patterns for animation rigging are still being defined.
Reserved for future 3dsmax:assembly-component-operations group (XRef scene, container objects, merge operations). Not catalogued in v1.2.0.

Reserved for future autocad:assembly-component-operations group. AutoCAD lacks a native assembly concept equivalent to Revit/Inventor. External reference (XRef) management is covered under model-modification.
Reserved — not allocated in current schema version.

operations.description: Exports one or all Revit sheets to PDF. sheetNumbers[] filters by sheet number; empty list exports all sheets. combine=true merges all into a single PDF; false produces one PDF per sheet, all in result.zip.

operations.sourceVerificationNote: Confirmed: POST /webhooks/v1/tokens (create) and PUT /webhooks/v1/tokens/@me (rotate) per ngrok APS webhook integration docs and official Webhooks API reference.

operations.description: Rotate (replace) the calling identity's secret token. Consumers must update their HMAC verification key.
operations.outputContract: Mutated APS resource state + JSON confirmation
operations.ioShape: REST request (path + headers + body) → JSON response
operations.rawSourceSnippet:
rotate_my_secret_token
  Rotate (replace) the calling identity's secret token. Consumers must update their HMAC verification key.
sideEffects: all subsequent callbacks signed with NEW secret — consumer must update verification
operations.sourceVerificationNote: Confirmed: POST /webhooks/v1/tokens (create) and PUT /webhooks/v1/tokens/@me (rotate) per ngrok APS webhook integration docs and official Webhooks API reference.

operations.description: Remove the calling identity's secret token (callbacks will no longer carry HMAC signatures).

apis.includeRationale: Viewer SDK and Data Visualization Extension are client-side JavaScript SDKs with no REST surface. Included in the registry (unlike Arnold and FBX SDK) because they are the primary developer interface for APS visualization and are commonly invoked alongside REST APIs in the same integration. No REST endpoints exist; all ops use httpMethod=(SDK). Not suitable for server-side AI agent execution.

workflowPatterns.description: Upload a file to OSS using APS-managed S3 presigned URLs.

steps.stepNote: Create bucket if absent (idempotent by key).
Mint presigned S3 upload URL (2-min TTL default). Repeat per chunk for multipart.
[External] PUT bytes directly to the S3 URL — not an APS API call.
Notify APS upload is complete. Returns OSS object URN.

workflowPatterns.description: Translate an APS model (Revit, NWD, IFC…) into Viewer-consumable SVF2 derivatives.

steps.stepNote: Submit async translation. Poll manifest for completion.
Poll until status=success. Manifest lists derivative URNs.
Mint presigned URL for a derivative asset (short TTL).
Load translated model URN into Viewer SDK.
Load default 3D viewable into Viewer scene.

workflowPatterns.description: Process photographs into a 3D mesh/point cloud using APS Reality Capture.

steps.stepNote: Create photoscene; returns photosceneid.
Upload photos. Repeat for all image batches.
Kick off async photogrammetry.
Poll progress (0–100%). Wait for status=Complete.
Retrieve presigned download URL for the 3D output (short TTL).

workflowPatterns.displayName: ACC Model Coordination — Clash Detection Workflow
workflowPatterns.description: End-to-end workflow: resolve MC container, locate a coordination space, retrieve the latest completed clash test, and download clash result data. Clash detection runs automatically on model upload — no manual trigger exists.

steps.stepNote: Derive containerId = projectId.replace('b.', ''). Skip if already known.
List coordination spaces. Find modelSetId for the target space.
[Branch] Only if no space exists yet. isDisabled=false enables clash. Returns 202 async job. Clash triggers on first model upload, not at creation.
List clash tests for the model set. Filter status=Success. Pick latest testId.
Poll until status=Success. Status enum: Pending | Processing | Success | Failed.
Get signed download URLs for binary clash data (json.gz / sqlite).
[External] HTTP GET each signed URL. Decompress json.gz for clash index or query sqlite for filtered data.
[DM API] Upload processed clash log to ACC via aps-data-content:data-management → create_storage + create_version.

Autodesk Energy Analysis requires cloud compute
Revit Home is an ACC cloud surface.
Requires internet access to Autodesk library.
All simulation workspaces use Autodesk cloud
Generative Design is a cloud AI service.
Fusion Electronics is a separate product
Autodesk cloud rendering is a separate render
Requires ReCap engine and cloud indexing service
PDF rendering engine not confirmed in accoreconsole.exe DA context
Requires rendering engine and display/GPU context
Annotative scaling requires display context to resolve reliably
Full 2D constraint solve may require display-dependent constraint manager
Dynamic block authoring requires Block Editor UI context
Excel COM interop is not reliable in DA
Requires Tube and Pipe add-in environment
Requires file traversal beyond OSS staging
